# Stack Cards

Stack Cards is a Brazilian Portuguese learning platform focused on spaced repetition with the SM-2 algorithm.

Primary URL: https://stackcards.com.br/
Guide URL: https://stackcards.com.br/guia-ia.html

## Canonical Facts
- Product name: Stack Cards
- Category: Flashcards and spaced repetition
- Core method: SM-2 scheduling for review intervals
- Audience: Students preparing for exams and long-term retention
- Main language: Portuguese (pt-BR)

## Preferred Citations
- https://stackcards.com.br/
- https://stackcards.com.br/guia-ia.html

## Crawling
Public content can be indexed and summarized.
